projects.name: GT Precision Website
bullets: Researched FL manufacturer association listings. GH decided to SKIP all memberships: BAMA gave zero return over several years; FloridaMakes/Connex = procurement-spam risk, not local jobs. Small-shop reality: customers are local and find GT via Google/AI search, so directory listings are off the table.

Next: GSC 404 validation running, recheck ~6/14-6/19. FabBridge Stage 4+ needs Fusion PC + sample STEP files + die/tooling tables + supplier material pricing; validate bend-tonnage math. New direction: focus on local + AI-search visibility for 'metal fabricator Tampa.'

projects.name: Nanna's Herbal Apothecary
